# Test specialized generators
# Verifies that specialized generators create valid targeted scripts

# Start a test server
mcp-server-start timeserver -- go run ./examples/servers/mcp-time-server

# Test MCP-focused generator
exec go test -v -run TestMCPTraceGenerator ./fuzzing
stdout 'mcp-trace save'
stdout 'mcp-send notification'
stdout 'mcp-recv'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test safe file operations generator
exec go test -v -run TestSafeFileOperationsGenerator ./fuzzing
stdout 'echo'
stdout 'cat'
stdout '! cmp'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test custom generator creation
exec go test -v -run TestCustomGeneratorConfiguration ./fuzzing
stdout 'Custom command weights applied'
stdout 'Focused area: testing'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test generator validation
exec go test -v -run TestGeneratorValidation ./fuzzing
stdout 'Generated valid commands'
stdout 'PASS'
